index.featuresSubtitle: Built for speed, simplicity, and quality. Everything you need to turn photos into PDF — nothing you don't.
index.feature1Desc: Combine up to 20 JPG files into a single PDF document. Each image becomes its own page, in the exact order you choose.
index.feature2Desc: Your photos are embedded at full resolution. No compression artifacts, no quality loss — what you upload is what you get.
index.feature3Desc: Your files are transferred over an encrypted connection and deleted automatically after conversion. Your images stay private.
index.feature4Desc: Conversion typically takes 2–3 seconds per batch. No waiting around — your PDF is ready almost instantly.
index.feature5Desc: Use it on Windows, Mac, iPhone, Android — no software to install. Just open a browser and convert.
index.feature6Desc: No subscriptions, no hidden fees, no watermarks. Convert as many JPGs to PDF as you need, free forever.
index.stepsTitle: How to Convert JPG to PDF
index.stepsSubtitle: Three steps. No hassle. Done in seconds.
index.step1Desc: Drag and drop your images onto the upload area, or click to browse your device. You can select up to 20 JPG or JPEG files at once.
index.step2Desc: Preview all your uploaded images on the next screen. Reorder them by dragging, or deselect any you don't want in the final PDF.
index.step3Desc: Click Convert, and your PDF will be ready in seconds. Download it to your device — one clean file with all your images inside.
index.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about converting JPG images to PDF.
index.faq1Q: Is this JPG to PDF converter really free?
index.faq1A: Yes, completely. There are no charges, no subscriptions, and no watermarks. You can convert as many JPG images to PDF as you like without creating an account.
index.faq2Q: How many JPG files can I convert at once?
index.faq2A: You can upload up to 20 JPG or JPEG files in a single batch. All selected images are merged into one PDF, with each image as a separate page.
index.faq3Q: Will my image quality be reduced?
index.faq3A: No. Your images are embedded at their original resolution. We don't compress or downscale your photos — the PDF will look exactly like your source images.
index.faq4A: The converter accepts .jpg and .jpeg files. For PNG, WebP, or other image formats, you can use our separate image conversion tools.
index.faq5Q: Is there a file size limit?
index.faq5A: Each individual file can be up to 50 MB. There's no total batch size limit, so you can comfortably convert high-resolution photos.
index.faq6Q: Are my files safe and private?
index.faq6A: Yes. All uploads are encrypted in transit using HTTPS. Your files are stored temporarily on our server and automatically deleted after 1 hour. We never share your data.
index.faq7Q: Can I change the page order before converting?
index.faq7A: Yes. After uploading, you'll see a preview of all your images. You can rearrange the order there before clicking Convert.
index.faq8Q: Does it work on iPhone and Android?
index.faq8A: Absolutely. The tool runs entirely in your browser — no app to download. It works on iOS, Android, and any modern mobile browser.
index.aboutTitle: About This JPG to PDF Converter
index.aboutP1: Converting JPG images to PDF is one of the most common file tasks people do — whether you're scanning documents, archiving photos, or sending multiple pictures as a single file. This tool makes that process as simple as possible.
index.aboutP2: You can upload up to 20 JPEG or JPG images at once. Each image becomes a page in your PDF, in the exact order you choose. There's a full preview step so you can rearrange or remove any images before the final conversion.
index.aboutP3: Unlike many online converters, we don't compress your images or add watermarks. Your PDF will contain your photos at their original resolution, exactly as they look in the source files.
index.aboutP4: The entire conversion process happens on our secure server. Files are transferred over an encrypted HTTPS connection and are automatically deleted one hour after conversion — so your photos never linger on our system.
index.aboutP5: No account needed, no software to install, and no cost involved. Just pick your JPGs, arrange them the way you want, and download your PDF.
index.ctaSubtitle: Drop your JPG files above and get a clean PDF in seconds. No signup, no limits, no cost.
